messages.content: Apa yang dibahas pada perpres Nomor 39 tahun 2019?

"I don't have enough information in the document."

The document mentions "Undang-Undang Nomor 39 Tahun 2008 tentang Kementerian Negara", but it doesn't mention "Perpres Nomor 39 tahun 2019". Therefore, I couldn't find any information related to Perpres Nomor 39 tahun 2019 in the given context.
